text: Vitamin D supports bone and immune function. Food sources include salmon, sardines, egg yolks, and fortified dairy products.
Magnesium-rich foods include pumpkin seeds, almonds, spinach, black beans, and whole grains.
Vitamin C sources include bell peppers, kiwi, oranges, broccoli, and strawberries.
Iron sources include beef, lentils, spinach, tofu, and pumpkin seeds. Pair plant-based iron with vitamin C foods to support absorption.
